## Validation

## Risk

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No hardcoded machine-specific absolute paths
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered (or intentionally broken and documented)
- [ ] Changelog updated if user-facing behavior/docs changed
- [ ] Measurable/public claims include evidence links
